Author: moonslicedd
Content:
||@MEMBER@DESIGNERsorry for ping!|| 
Elo!! Hope all of you are having a fabulous day!
And to make that day a tiny bit better... I'll be hosting a building contest with some fun rewards!

__The build theme will be mountains!__
This contest will be starting at 23:30pm (GMT +3) and it'll last for an hour! (No that doesn't stop you from starting early and getting the lead!)
The build's shall be sent in #🏡・builds channel with a mention of @The_Bear__ !!! (build's wont be accepted without these)

**!! RULES !!**
1. No Mods That Give Building Advantages (Like litematica or such).
2. Do not steal idea's/builds from other's! (yes inspiration is allowed but completely just stealing the idea's/builds will not be permitted).
3. All builds must comply with the server's rules.
4. Finish your build within the time limit. (no build's will be accepted after the time end's!!!)
5. The builds must be built solo. (mean's no one is suppost to help you build your mountain but help with detail and such is allowed)

**Rewards**
1st - CREATOR rank and 2000$ in game
(If the rank is temporary (a month or more) or perm will depend on the 1st place winner's build)
2nd - Designer rank/upgrade to architect and 1000$ in game
3rd - 500$ in game
4th/and below - A huge thanks for competing! and hope to see you in some other event's ❤️
(If you end up winning 1st place and don't need the rank it can be given to a player of your choice)

(If you want to take some inspiration for your own build you can check out my build I've yet to finish in my plot (`/p v The_Bear__`))

Hope you have lot's of fun!!!

`The_Bear__ SR. MOD`

Hello everyone! Hope all of you are doing alright on this fine day!
My birthday was on 26th and I had lots of fun.
But this is not what its about, as a past bday gift for yall i want to host an event for a chance to win some fun rewards! 😉 
✨ **EVENT** ✨ 
Building

🌲 **Theme** 🌲 
Forest

🕓 **Time** 🕐 
6/9/2025 6:00 PM

📜 **RULES** 📜 
Build's must follow the theme
Only original work (no tutorial's or etc.)
Don't steal other's build's
Don't grief other's
Builds must be built in your plot
Post results in #🏡・builds with a ping of @The_Bear__ 

🏅 **Ratings** 🏅

Content:
Hello all! It’s the first event of September! To celebrate the first days of September, we will be hosting an Iceboating race event!  

📜**Rules are as follows:**
- All 50XCreative rules apply
- Staff are not allowed to participate in the race
- Gamemode Survival is Required 
- Boats will be provided (no placing your own)

**-Other Info**
This event will take place in **2-3 hours** from now so be prepared to race, we will notify you **30 minutes** before we start! 

- All staff are welcome to help setup for the event. 

Anyone can do /p visit EVENTS to already be ready to participate in the event.

❌**Elimination** ❌
There will be 1-2 Rounds elimination, then the last 10 players will compete in the final race to victory for the 3 main prizes 

🎊**Prizes** 🎉

How can we do an event without prizes:

1st Place: 500 In Game Dollars
2nd Place: 200 In Game Dollars 
3rd Place: 100 In Game Dollars

I hope yall can attend this event to have some fun. We may even do some pre-event games in the mix! 
Have Fun
~SG 
@Events

Author: sggopen
Content:
🎄✨ Holiday Build Event Announcement ✨🎄

Hello everyone! To celebrate the holiday season, we’re excited to kick things off with a Holiday-Themed Build Event! Get creative, spread some festive cheer, and show off your building skills in this special event hosted on our plots world.

📜 Event Rules
    •    All 50XCreative rules apply
    •    Staff members may not participate in the competition
    •    Builds must be created in Plots
    •    All builds must follow a holiday theme (winter, Christmas, New Year, festive decorations, etc.)
    •    Builds must be created during the event timeframe
W/e is not allowed
Copy pasta is not allowed

ℹ️ Event Information
    •    🕛 Event Start Time: Sunday, 21 December 2025 5:00:00 PM
    •    ⏰ A 30-minute reminder will be sent via Discord
    •    ⏳ Event Duration: 48 hours from the start
    •    🏁 Event End Time: Tuesday, 23 December 2025 6:00:00 PM
    •    All staff are welcome to assist with event setup and moderation

🎨 Judging & Elimination
    •    There will be 1–2 elimination rounds based on creativity, theme accuracy, and overall design
    •    The top 10 builders will advance to the final judging round
    •    Final placements will determine the top 3 winners

🎁 Prizes

🥇 1st Place — Rank Upgrade + Holiday Winner Title
    •    Rank Upgrade
    •    Exclusive Restricted Holiday Title: ❄️ Holiday Winner
    •    $500 In-Game Money

🥈 2nd Place — Holiday Power Bundle
    •    $250 In-Game Money
    •    3× Vote Crate Keys
    •    Exclusive Holiday Title: ❄️ Festive Champion

🥉 3rd Place — Holiday Starter Bundle
    •    $150 In-Game Money
    •    1× Vote Crate Key
    •    Exclusive Holiday Title: 🎄 Seasonal Builder

We hope to see everyone there bringing the holiday spirit to life! There may even be some fun pre-event activities before judging begins.

Good luck, have fun, and happy building! 🎄✨
— SG

@Events
@Event Priority

Author: justliferobbers
Content:
📢 **BUILD COMPETITION ANNOUNCEMENT** 📢

🏗️ **City Build Challenge** 🏙️
Get ready to show off your building skills!

📐 **Plot Size:** 14 x 15 blocks
📏 **Max Height:** 20 blocks
🎨 **Theme:** **City Building**

Build anything that fits a city vibe — houses, shops, offices, apartments, landmarks, or any creative urban design you can imagine!

📍 **RULES / REQUIREMENTS:**

* Builds must be built **inside your main plot**
* When finished, **post a picture of your build in the #build channel**
* **Include your Minecraft username** in your post so we know who built it

🏆 **Judging will be based on:**

* Creativity
* Detail
* How well it fits the city theme

👑 **PRIZE:**

* **The winning build will be added permanently to the City of Faith**
* **Winner receives the exclusive 🏛️ ARCHITECT rank 🏛️**

⏰ **DEADLINE:**

* **You have until 📅 25/01/2026 to submit your build**

Good luck to everyone, and most importantly — **have fun building!** 🚀
